name: Brownie Mousse Delight
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Large instant chocolate pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the brownies according to the package instructions and allow them to cool completely.
2. Prepare the instant chocolate pudding according to the directions on the box, using only 1/2 cup of cold milk for a mousse consistency.
3. In a large glass serving bowl, layer the ingredients as follows: (it looks nice in a clear glass bowl). Start with half of the crumbled brownies at the bottom of the bowl, followed by half of the pudding mixture. Top with half of the cool whip.
4. Repeat the layers with the remaining brownies, the other half of the pudding, and the remaining cool whip.
5. Sprinkle toffee sprinkles on top (or use additional brownie crumbs if desired).
6. Chill thoroughly before serving cold.
This recipe is very chocolately and perfect for chocoholics!
